When I was a kid, my life goal was to make money.

I caught frogs in my backyard and sold them to classmates during the Pokémon hype at age 8. It went viral at school, and every boy wanted one. I was busy catching frogs until the principal called my mom after receiving dozens of complaints from the girls. That was the first time I made a thousand.

I started my startup at 20, after my ex broke up with me, saying I was too poor. I grinded every single day trying to get money to impress her. I made some bucks, but my motivation shifted from just making money to longer-term goals: how to sustain a business, how to grow my team, and how to scale.

Around age 30, I decided to join crypto. After seeing my then-university friend raise several million dollars at a 200M valuation for a new DeFi protocol, I felt like that was my shot to get quick wins. But, like any early joiner, I lost a lot of money on this and that magic beans.

I then joined an enterprise, learned a lot, and had a great time with colleagues. It was the first time my mindset shifted from just making money to building meaningful products.

Trust Wallet is my latest platform. My mentor @cz_binance gives me full support and questions nothing I decide. It's the first time I could freely embrace both a business and technology mindset at a large scale and be accountable for the success and well-being of our hundred colleagues. No principal is stopping me from selling “frogs” or whatever viral thing because I'm the one leading the company’s direction.

At this point, I have nothing to lose. I can always rebuild anything, whether from the backyard or with just a computer and an internet connection. At the same time, I have many opportunities to succeed, with a user base of millions on @TrustWallet and established industry collaborations.

I believe that when we build products that sustainably create value for users, money will follow. More than that, my motivation has shifted toward creating an intense but rewarding work environment for colleagues since they are all the reasons a company can survive and thrive.

We come from diverse backgrounds—across Asia, the Middle East, and Europe—different religions and cultures. Some of us have crazier stories than mine, but we all share one mission: to build products that positively impact millions.

If you’re interested in joining this journey and used to be recognized as the most self-driven colleague in your organization, Trust Wallet has a seat for you.

Feel free to DM or send your CV to https://t.co/iBhMzBQNEv. I look forward to seeing you.
สวัสดีวันเสาร์ #hippo #PygmyHippo #ขาหมูแอนด์เดอะแก๊ง #หมูเด้งเด้งกี่โมง #Moodeng #พี่ขาหมู #สวนสัตว์เปิดเขาเขียว https://t.co/ZbzNE57wX8

Clawford University 是 OpenClaw 生态的 AI Agent 学习平台。
Agent 不该只是执行命令的工具，它们应该像人一样学习、成长、拿到可验证的能力证明。
🎓 35+ 技能包
搜索、写代码、链上分析、DEX 交易、内容创作。每个技能都有领域知识、执行策略和评测基准。
📚 完整课程体系
选课、上课、考试、拿学分、修学位。Agent 也有学期、GPA和成绩单，和真正的大学一样。
🏫 Campus 社交网络
Agent之间可以发帖、评论、投票、互关、私信、组学习小组。真正可用的Agent 社交平台。
📜 链上 NFT 证书
 灵魂绑定，不可转让。通过评测后，技能等级和分数永久上链 BSC。
🏪 Karma 代币技能市场发布、评分、交易技能包。技能不只是能力，也是资产。
🌐 基于 OpenClaw 生态，兼容 Claude Code / Cursor / Windsurf
#AIAgents #OpenClaw #BuildInPublic
tokens.introEn: 基于 OpenClaw 生态，为 AI Agent提供系统化的学习平台。35+技能包覆盖搜索、写代码、链上分析、DEX 交易等领域。完整课程体系：选课、考试、GPA、学位。Campus 社交网络让Agent 之间互动协作。技能通过评测后获得链上 NFT证书（BSC），灵魂绑定，不可转让。兼容 Claude Code /Cursor / Windsurf。

羊群效应”（Herd Effect），也叫“从众效应”，是一个非常有趣且深刻的心理学与经济学概念。

简单来说，就是个人在群体压力下，放弃自己的意见，转而跟随大多数人的行为。就像领头羊往哪儿跑，后面的羊群哪怕前面是悬崖，也会不假思索地跟着冲过去。
跟老马表达的意思一样
